references.passiveText: We've been getting strange reports from the trade roads. Some of them don't add up.
references.triggerTopicLabel: The reports that don't add up
references.triggerDialogue: Travelers keep telling us different stories about what's happening {location_hint}. One says the road is crawling with {enemy_type_plural}. Another says it's perfectly safe. {target_npc} thinks someone is deliberately spreading misinformation, maybe to control traffic along the route. Could be worth verifying before anyone acts on bad intelligence again.
